changesProposed.name: Founders Fund

verified.name: Founders Fund
verified.thesis: Founders Fund focuses on ambitious projects that resolve real challenges and create transformative technology. The firm has gradually shifted from early-stage consumer internet toward hard tech, defense technology, space exploration, artificial intelligence, and biotech.
verified.notes: In 2025, Founders Fund raised Founders Fund Growth III at $4.6 billion for late-stage investments. Wikipedia lists AUM as $17 billion as of 2025. Founded July 2005 by Peter Thiel, Ken Howery, and Luke Nosek.
